overview: Ice Spider is a Normal-class Beast/Insect monster found in Ice Abyss. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 9900 HP, 11 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 5. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Self Destruct at 180% ratio (198 base damage). Sight range 800, combat radius 80.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Frost Pool
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Frost Pool icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Frost Pool Slow
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Frost Pool Slow icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 800 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 800 units, loses target at 1000 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 80, ability check distance 120
strategies.description: Combat area radius 80. Ability check distance 120.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 800 units. Loses target at 1000 units.
